titleStmt.title: SII 40.269: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 269. (A.R. No. B. 314 of 1933.) Nārṇepāḍu, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a broken Nandi pillar opposite to the temple of Bhīmēśvarasvāmi.

Refers to Origoṇḍi Rēmana of the Śrivatsa-gōtra who was the minister of the king Rājēndrachōḍa and was appointed by him the governor of Kamma-dēśa. Mentions Prolāṁbikā wife of Goṅka II and Drōṇa. Records the construction of a temple Kumārēśvara and excavation of a tank called Drōṇasamudra at Nārāyaṇapāḍu by Komman-āmātya, a minister of Goṅka II.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī stana cakravāka makarī cihnāṁkkitōrasthalō
rājadrāja kalāvataṁsa kalaśadrājēṁdracōḍādhipaḥ
tasyābhū dorigoṁḍirēmana Iti śrīvatsagōtrāṁ
kkitā maṁtrī maṁtri śikhaṁḍamaṁḍanamaṇiḥ prītēṁddu
cūḍāmaṇiḥ . śrīkammadēśādhikritaḥ kritā¨rtthī mahāma
hibhāradhurandharīṇa tatsā¨rvvābhaumēna mahānubhā
vō rājēṁdra cihnassahasāsahaiva . tasyōdabhū
dbhānurivōdayādrē drōṇaḥ pravīṇassakalāgamēgha
prālāṁbikā tasya babhūva jāyā girīṁdra putrīva
mrigāṁkkamauḷeḥ . tābhyāmubhābhyāṁ bhuvanābhi
rāmōjātaḥ kumāraśśamitārividaḥ bhavadbhavānyō
mivatārakāri¨rllōṁkatrayatrāṇa vidhānadakṣaḥ .
dalaṁttikaldhāravanātarāṇi pātuṁ cakōrārivridagu
tpataṁticakrā yaśaścakra vijṛṁbhaṇē na caṁdrātapabhrānti
mavāpyayasya . yasya prabhūtādhvara bhūmalēkhā
digaṁgganāpatra latābhirāmātrayīvadhūlōcanakajjalō
bhā nīlāśśahārāḥ khacarīkucēṣu . lakṣmīlakṣita vakṣasaḥ kṣi
tibhritāṁ cōḍasya cūḍāmaṇiḥ krīḍākrōḍita gauḍalāṭa
kaṭakō goṁkkakṣitīśassutaḥ . yēnēyaṁprithvīprithāḥ prithu
kṛtāhastā¨rggaḷēnā¨rggaṁḷē dattamattavirōdhi rājavijaya śrī
kāṁttayākāṁttayā . Amātyalakṣmīmupagamya da
mātya kommaśmaradaṁ prahādya rarāja rājīva

kūṭaḥ . śailapratīci viṣayā
grāmōsti nārāyaṇapērināmā Ārāmalēkhāruci
kaṁtō madhuvratamritōbapaṭṭiḥ . tasminukumārē
ṁḍu mauliṁbhaktyā pratiṣṭhāpya nijasrubhalē Acikaratta
ṁdrakūṭa kōṭiragāraṁ bhavanaṁ bhavasya . vriṣaḥ kimu
katanasya tasyā hā maśilōccayannu . Itismita
yanti mucyakairacīkaranmaṇḍapamiṁḍumōḷe . ghaṁṭa
latāṁbukanivilasaccatrāṇyamatrāṭiciḥśvaṁścaccha
la cāmarāṇi rucirairabhraṁkkaṣaiḥ kētanai¨rdhvasō na
ṣaṇāniśibikāmullōcamullōlitaṁ gaurī bha¨rtturadāda
tvatilakaḥ prōlāṁbikānaṁddanaḥ . haṁsasārasaradoṁgga
gaibhriṁggabhūṣitacalajjalajātamallalallaharikai¨rddala
dāritaṁ ghanataṭaṁcya taṭākaṁ . tasmanivēdyā¨rtthamadāttaṭāka
drōyata drōṇasamudra saṁjñaṁ . kalakyaṇatkōkila kīrapa
tārāmalēkhāvrita śāliśāliṁ . mahīsurāṇāṁ ma
tōmahiyānumahēśvarā¨rtthaṁmmahanīyyakī¨rtti śrī
bivva¨rttanikai¨rvvi bhaktāmahimahātmādiśadāyugu
Digital edition of SII 40.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
